Student.title: Student
Student.description: A student profile registered on SkillSync

id.description: The unique user identity identifier matching Firebase Auth UID

name.description: Full name of the academic peer

avatar.description: Initials representing the academic's avatar profile

Project.title: Project
Project.description: An active collaborative project opportunity or venture

description.description: Detailed description of project and goals

creatorId.description: Student UID of the project architect

creatorName.description: Name of the developer who created the project

creatorAvatar.description: Avatar initials representing the system architect

category.description: Structural academic field category of project

status.description: Project baseline development cycle milestone status

createdAt.description: Relative or ISO date string of project listing

Community.title: Community
Community.description: A shared interest category board/topic guild for student developers

name.description: Name of the community interest group

description.description: Theme and outline overview of community forum

postsCount.description: Total historic topics created in community

iconName.description: Lucide icon string name used in visual layout

ChatThread.title: ChatThread
ChatThread.description: A private direct messaging thread channel with another peer

participantAvatar.description: Avatar initials of the communication peer

participantRole.description: Academic title description profile of peer

lastMessage.description: Context preview snippet of most recent direct message content

lastMessageTime.description: Time reference tracker of last update

unreadCount.description: Total new messages unread by client profile

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single text bubble content in a conversation channel or community category sub-thread

senderId.description: Student UID sender of the message

senderName.description: Full display name of student sender

senderAvatar.description: Profile visual avatar icon of sender

text.description: Plaintext body content of chat text

/students/{studentId}.description: Information profiles representing verified student users

/communities/{communityId}.description: Global lists of interactive topic communities

/threads/{threadId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Direct messages under a specific conversation channel thread

/communities/{communityId}/messages/{mes.description: Interactive posts and comments under specific community boards
